lines: Do you think i need to learn more about this Square?
I want a book with more detail on this.
I need a book that teach basic words or creative thinking
I'm helping this kid with his imagination
I want to know more about how this was build
I need to get a hand on how old it is
Hey, can i get some bright colored book

Hey i need to know what is this place called
